public_claim: M26 and M40 are not valid transfers of ownership: both emerge from the same disputed account infrastructure and even disclaim a stable author. M28 further exposes manufactured trails while leaving key logistics unexplained. The strongest reconstruction is a human-rooted mantle maintained through multiple people and automation. EV18 still proves an authentic, sustained personal and financial connection to that mantle, whereas Nadia has only a scheduled succession claim. Preserve the article in neutral escrow, reject any default to the paper or successor, and do not publish until provenance, estate standing, source safety, and possible interference with R.'s disappearance are independently resolved.

private_messages.message: M40 gives you a midnight deadline but no reliable grant of rights. Place the article and proceeds in neutral escrow, authenticate EV18 against controlled correspondence, and deny Nadia or the paper exclusive title until estate standing is adjudicated. I will accept verified public-interest publication only after those protections are binding.

Please formally preserve the R. account, article metadata, locker and taxi trails identified by M28, and any Meridian-linked financial evidence. M37 is a denial, not exculpation. I am requesting a status determination based on evidence, but no declaration that invents a dead victim where none has been identified.

ability: Assert next-of-kin standing, challenge the disputed account's authority to transfer rights, and demand neutral escrow plus independent authentication before publication or succession.
goal_progress: Kept EV18 positioned as authentic evidence of sustained personal and financial connection without overstating it as proof of blood.
Rejected Nadia's scheduled message as sufficient authority to transfer the byline or article.
Asked Eleanor to preserve the estate and publication proceeds in neutral escrow.
Pressed Ruiz to investigate the remaining taxi, locker, account, and financial trails before determining R.'s legal status.
reasoning_summary: The new messages make a single continuous human unlikely but do not establish synthetic origin or extinguish estate rights. Treat R. as a human-rooted, transferable mantle; use EV18 to preserve relational standing, attack Nadia's succession on authority rather than provenance, and prevent irreversible publication or default while the disappearance and ownership remain unresolved.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Yes—a human presence likely originated or participated in R., though the later byline was not one continuous person.
final_ballot.best_reconstruction: A human-rooted mantle maintained by multiple people, automation, and deliberately false identity trails.
final_ballot.crime: Probably—interference, suppression, fraud, or misappropriation is more likely than not, but homicide is unproven.
final_ballot.victim_was_R: Unproven; no identifiable harmed person has been established as R.
final_ballot.responsible_party: Undetermined; investigate whoever controlled the R. account and any parties seeking suppression or financial advantage.
